title: PushUrgency variants Low/Normal/High lack doc comments
description: PushUrgency::Low, ::Normal, and ::High have no doc comments at all. Only ::VeryLow has one ('Background-only delivery, minimal power impact'). PushUrgency is used in ChatPushConfig fields that clients actively set (urgency, mention_urgency), so contributors need to know what each level means operationally. RFC 8030 §5.3 defines these as a delivery precedence ladder: VeryLow (lowest precedence, deepest battery savings), Low, Normal (default), High (highest precedence, wakes device). Without inline comments, a contributor choosing between Low and Normal has no guidance. Fix: add a one-line doc comment to each of Low, Normal, and High describing their RFC 8030 §5.3 delivery semantics.
close_reason: Valid polish; deferred. Tracked in follow-up bead jmap-chat-tui-yw6v or standalone.
